title: Statement of Mutual Understanding (SMU) on Information-Sharing - Canada.ca
content:
## Statement of Mutual Understanding (SMU) on Information-Sharing
Citizenship and Immigration Canada (CIC), the United States Immigration and Naturalization Service (USINS) and the United States Department of State have recently re-signed a Statement of Mutual Understanding (SMU) on Information-Sharing.
About the Statement of Mutual Understanding on Information-Sharing
Statement of Mutual Understanding (SMU) on Information-Sharing
Annexes to the Statement of Mutual Understanding on Information-Sharing Consult the annexes to the Statement of Mutual Understanding on Information-Sharing. More annexes will be added as they become available.
- Annex Regarding the Sharing of Information on Asylum and Refugee Status Claims Backgrounder | Annex
